'''Wasser Barer''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who lived at the time of the blockade of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. He was one of the racers that were enlisted for a pod race on the planet [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]], participating in the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]]. Over the first few races, he qualified for Malastare's final race through the methane deserts to race alongside experienced pilots such as [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] and [[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]], with Sebulba finally winning the race.
